shape.lists: Array<{ id: string, name: string, cards: Array<{ id: string, title: string }> }>

BoardState.notes: Plain JSON-serializable object. No functions, no Dates. Cards are title-only per IP1.

getState.returns: BoardState — the current full board, used by persistence.save.

setState.returns: void — replaces the entire current board, used by app-shell on boot after persistence.load returns a value.

subscribe.returns: () => void — unsubscribe function. persistence wires save(state) here so every mutation autosaves.

notes: state-model is the producer; persistence is the consumer. Persistence does not call any mutation directly — it only reads via getState/subscribe and writes back via setState during boot.
